transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Thank you for calling PhysicsWallah. This is Priya, how can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Hi... main JEE ke baare mein jaanna chahta tha. Kuch courses ke baare mein information chahiye thi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul! Main aapki help kar sakti hun. Pehle aap apna naam bata sakte hain? Aur aap currently kis class mein hain?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Main Aakash hun, Aakash Singh. Abhi Class 10 mein hun.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Nice to meet you Aakash! Class 10 se hi JEE ki preparation start karna bahut accha decision hai. Aap kab tak JEE dena chahte hain? 2027 mein?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan... 2027 mein. But main abhi sirf explore kar raha hun options. Sure nahi hun ki kya karna hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's completely fine Aakash! Smart approach hai explore karna. Hamare paas Class 10 se JEE ke liye perfect courses hain. JEE Lakshya 2027 aur JEE Arjuna 2027 - dono hi 2 saal ka comprehensive program hai. Kya aap online classes prefer karenge ya offline?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Online hi better rahega. But... pricing kya hai? Budget ki thodi problem hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Main samajh sakti hun Aakash. Dekho, JEE Arjuna 2027 sirf 19,999 rupees mein hai - complete 2 years ka. Aur agar EMI chahiye toh 1,999 rupees per month. That's like daily chai-nashta se bhi kam!

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Hmm... 20,000 rupees... thoda zyada lag raha hai. Koi aur option hai kya?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Haan bilkul! JEE Arjuna mein sab kuch included hai - live classes, recorded lectures, doubt solving, test series. Lekin main samajh rahi hun budget concern. 0% EMI hai hamare paas - PW Pay se sirf 1,999 rupees monthly. Kya aap parents se discuss kar sakte hain?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Haan... mujhe parents se baat karni padegi. Main decide nahi kar sakta abhi. Aur kya included hai exactly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure Aakash! JEE Arjuna mein aapko milta hai - daily live classes by expert teachers, unlimited doubt support, weekly tests, previous year questions, aur complete study material. Sab kuch 2 saal ke liye. Main aapka number le sakti hun? Parents se discuss karne ke baad call back kar denge?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Abhi number nahi dena chahta... main khud call kar lunga. Koi aur information hai jo main parents ko bata sakun?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course! Aap parents ko bata sakte hain ki PhysicsWallah India ka most affordable platform hai. Alakh Sir khud padhate hain, success rate bahut high hai. Aur 0% EMI facility bhi hai. Kab tak call back kar paoge approximately?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: 2-3 din mein... maybe. Abhi confirm nahi kar sakta. Main bas explore kar raha hun different options.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect Aakash! No pressure at all. Jab bhi ready ho, hum yahan hain. Agar koi aur questions hain toh feel free to call. PhysicsWallah mein admission lene ke liye main personally help kar sakti hun. All the best for your preparation!

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Thanks Priya. Main parents se baat karke definitely consider karunga. Bye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Most welcome Aakash! Take your time, parents se discuss karna. Jab bhi call karoge, hum ready hain aapki help karne ke liye. Have a great day!

slack_message.preview: ❄️ COLD lead: Aakash Singh, JEE Main, Class 10, Lucknow. Early stage, low urgency. Added to nurture campaign.

email.subject: Start Your JEE Main Preparation Early — PhysicsWallah
email.preview: Hi Aakash, thank you for reaching out to PhysicsWallah! Even though your exam is a while away, starting early gives you a real advantage.

crm_record.notes: Low urgency, budget concern. Long-term nurture via email drip campaign.
